• Are you a current or former employee of the Trevor Project?*
  • If you are a current employee of the Trevor Project, have you been in your position for at least one year?
  • Are you currently a volunteer for The Trevor Project?*
  • Are you currently a contractor through a third party for The Trevor Project?*
  • Are you currently related to an employee of The Trevor Project? If so, to whom, and what is the relation?✱
